subject: [PATCH v3 1/2] mm: drop page refcount zero state semantics

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about naming conventions and suggested alternative names. Also pointed out potential issues with VM_BUG_ONs after patch 2.

reviews.author: ilya.gladyshev@linux.dev (patch author)
reviews.summary: Responded to reviewer's concerns, agreeing with some suggestions and apologizing for mistakes. Also acknowledged the need for changes.

2026-06-04.patch_summary: The patch aims to drop the page refcount zero state semantics, but several reviewers raised concerns and suggested changes.
